title: pothuava triticina var. capensis
side_effects: Pothuava triticina var. capensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea in individuals who consume it in large quantities. In rare cases, it may also lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation, hives, and respiratory issues. Furthermore, using the plant in excessive amounts can result in liver damage and interact with certain medications, potentially leading to adverse health consequences. It's essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Pothuava triticina var. capensis to minimize the risk of these side effects.
